# API Contracts

<!-- Generated by /ai-context. Manual edits are overwritten on re-run. -->

## AS IS — Current state

### Not applicable in this repository

CertGuardMini is a standalone WPF desktop prototype with no HTTP API surface, no REST endpoints, no gRPC services, and no message queue producers/consumers. All communication is internal:

- `CertBrokerService` and `ProxyService` communicate via direct method calls and `EventHandler<T>` events.
- The UI (`MainWindow.xaml.cs`) subscribes to service events and calls service methods directly.
- The proxy listens on port 8888 as a forward HTTPS proxy (not an API server) — it intercepts browser traffic, not API requests.
- `docs/API-ENDPOINTS.md` describes a planned Laravel backend API (auth, devices, certificates, sessions, heartbeat, navigation policy, navigation events, certificate events) but none of it is implemented in the CertGuardMini codebase.
